primary_accounting_issue: Eligibility for hedge accounting of foreign currency risk arising from an intragroup dividend receivable recognised in consolidated financial statements

primary_authority.reason: Defines conditions for hedge accounting and provides an exception for foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items in consolidated statements
Hedge accounting requirements for foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items; specifies that only external parties can be hedging instruments

supporting_authority.reason: Explains that intragroup monetary assets cannot be eliminated and create foreign exchange exposure in consolidated financial statements
Clarifies eligible hedged items and hedging instruments for net investment hedges, providing analogous guidance for intragroup items

peripheral_authority.reason: Disclosures about subsidiaries and non-controlling interests, not directly relevant to hedge accounting eligibility
Related party disclosure requirements, not applicable to hedge accounting treatment
Hedge accounting disclosures, but not eligibility criteria
Presentation of equity and OCI, not relevant to hedge eligibility
Hyperinflation accounting, unrelated to foreign currency hedge of intragroup dividend
Dividend distributions, not about hedge accounting

treatment_families.family: Hedge accounting for foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements
Recognition of exchange differences on intragroup dividend receivable without hedge accounting

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of foreign currency risk
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Permitted for a recognised financial asset exposed to foreign currency risk, provided hedge accounting criteria are satisfied

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge of foreign currency risk
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Allowed for variability in cash flows attributable to foreign currency risk of a monetary item, subject to meeting qualifying criteria

approaches.label: Recognition of exchange differences in profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Default treatment when hedge accounting is not applied; exchange differences on monetary items are recognised in profit or loss under IAS 21
